focus_points.label: Turning design leadership into org influence
focus_points.reason: What’s changed in his willingness to take visible strategic positions after being passed over last cycle, and whether he’s still building the relationships that translate execution into sponsorship.

focus_points.label: Decision ownership at the next level
focus_points.reason: Whether he’s clear on the tradeoffs he’s expected to own (and when to escalate), so his leadership shows up as decisions—not just shipped work.

focus_points.label: Cross-functional impact and decision outcomes
focus_points.reason: What he can point to where design leadership changed another team’s plan or decisions, since Lead growth is usually proven through boundary-spanning outcomes.

focus_points.label: What sponsorship Toby wants from you
focus_points.reason: How they want you to help create the sponsorship and visibility they’re not taking on their own right now, so the growth contract includes concrete air cover and introductions.
